members.name: Close
members.summary: Closes this data channel, notifying the other peer.

members.name: GetBufferedAmount
members.summary: Returns the number of bytes currently queued to be sent over this channel.

members.name: GetId
members.summary: Returns the ID assigned to this channel during creation (or auto-assigned during negotiation). If the channel is not negotiated out-of-band the ID will only be available after the connection is established (will return [code]65535[/code] until then).

members.name: GetLabel
members.summary: Returns the label assigned to this channel during creation.

members.name: GetMaxPacketLifeTime
members.summary: Returns the [code]maxPacketLifeTime[/code] value assigned to this channel during creation. Will be [code]65535[/code] if not specified.

members.name: GetMaxRetransmits
members.summary: Returns the [code]maxRetransmits[/code] value assigned to this channel during creation. Will be [code]65535[/code] if not specified.

members.name: GetProtocol
members.summary: Returns the sub-protocol assigned to this channel during creation. An empty string if not specified.

members.name: GetReadyState
members.summary: Returns the current state of this channel.

members.name: IsNegotiated
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this channel was created with out-of-band configuration.

members.name: IsOrdered
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this channel was created with ordering enabled (default).

members.name: Poll
members.summary: Reserved, but not used for now.

members.name: WasStringPacket
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the last received packet was transferred as text. See [member write_mode].

members.name: WriteMode
members.summary: The transfer mode to use when sending outgoing packet. Either text or binary.

values.name: STATE_CLOSED
values.summary: The channel was closed, or connection failed.

values.name: STATE_CLOSING
values.summary: The channel is being closed, no new messages will be accepted, but those already in queue will be flushed.

values.name: STATE_CONNECTING
values.summary: The channel was created, but it's still trying to connect.

values.name: STATE_OPEN
values.summary: The channel is currently open, and data can flow over it.

values.name: WRITE_MODE_BINARY
values.summary: Tells the channel to send data over this channel as binary. An external peer (non-Godot) would receive this as array buffer or blob.

values.name: WRITE_MODE_TEXT
values.summary: Tells the channel to send data over this channel as text. An external peer (non-Godot) would receive this as a string.

constants.name: WRITE_MODE_TEXT
constants.summary: Tells the channel to send data over this channel as text. An external peer (non-Godot) would receive this as a string.

constants.name: WRITE_MODE_BINARY
constants.summary: Tells the channel to send data over this channel as binary. An external peer (non-Godot) would receive this as array buffer or blob.

constants.name: STATE_CONNECTING
constants.summary: The channel was created, but it's still trying to connect.

constants.name: STATE_OPEN
constants.summary: The channel is currently open, and data can flow over it.

constants.name: STATE_CLOSING
constants.summary: The channel is being closed, no new messages will be accepted, but those already in queue will be flushed.

constants.name: STATE_CLOSED
constants.summary: The channel was closed, or connection failed.
